title: MBA (Pharmaceutical Management)
content: MBA in Pharmaceutical Management program is a two years full time domain-specific which focusses on preparing the students to enter the Pharmaceutical and Healthcare industry. This pioneer program is focusing on making world class managers with basic aptitudes in masterminding and working organization systems; diagnosing and dealing with the Management problems. To Build Skilled & effective professionals for pharma sector by improving the quality and standards of pharmaceutical education and Management skills. The Pharmaceutical Management program, evolve and expands the students, over a period of two years by rigorous field work and academics helps them to clinch leading managerial positions in pharmaceutical industry. After successful graduation the students can join the industry in various sectors such as Pharmaceutical companies, Medical Devices, Market Research, Hospitals, IT Healthcare Verticals, Diagnostics, Pharmaceutical advertising, Financial Management, Medical Communication, Nutraceuticals and supplementary associated healthcare sectors. The profession also covers Business Analysis, Project Management, Client Servicing, Sales, Marketing and Business Development, Global Marketing, Operations etc. This MBA program is well recognized and well received by the Pharmaceutical and Healthcare industry. Bachelor's or Master's degree in Pharmacy (B.Pharm & M.Pharm), BDS, BHMS, BAMS, Biochemistry, Biotechnology, MBBS, Microbiology from a recognized University with a minimum of 50% marks in the aggregate. Students having MAT / XAT / CMAT / NMAT / GMAT/ CUET Score will be given preference in merit 01 Develop skills of analyzing, diagnosing and solving operational problems in Pharmaceutical and Healthcare care organization. 02 Articulate appropriate strategies for effective planning, implementation and evaluation of policies in pharma sector. 03 Build the industry ready graduates having the sound knowledge of the business processes, inculcate creativity, innovation, professional expertise, personal integrity, social responsibility. 04 The program will develop leadership abilities including team management, project coordination, and organizational behavior, adapted to the pharmaceutical sector. 05 Graduates will gain the ability to analyze financial statements, manage budgets, and make informed financial decisions specific to the pharmaceutical industry. 01 Able to formulate and implement effective business strategies specific to the pharmaceutical sector, including the product lifecycle management, market entry strategies and competitiveness. 02 Develop a deep understanding of the pharmaceutical industry's structure, includes drug development, regulatory frameworks, market dynamics, and the global healthcare landscape. 03 Expand strong leadership abilities to manage teams, drive organizational change, and foster innovation and R&D process, including clinical trials, product development. 04 Understand the economic aspects of global pharmaceutical market, including international business practices, global health issues and healthcare including cost-benefit analysis, health outcomes assessment. 05 Emphasize the ethical implications of Pharmaceutical management decisions and the Social responsibilities of Pharmaceutical companies. 01 Graduates shall understand the complexities of global pharmaceutical markets, including international regulations, cross-cutting collaborations, and global health issues, enabling them to develop and execute strategies for international expansion and global market incidence. 02 Graduates will excel in communication and interpersonal skills and effectively conveying complex information related to pharmaceutical and healthcare management. 03 Graduates will be committed to ethical practices and social responsibility, understanding the impact of pharmaceutical products on public health and ensuring that their management decisions align with ethical standards. Bachelor's or Master's degree in Pharmacy (B.Pharm & M.Pharm), BDS, BHMS, BAMS, Biochemistry, Biotechnology, MBBS, Microbiology from a recognized University with a minimum of 50% marks in the aggregate. Students having MAT / XAT / CMAT / NMAT / GMAT/ CUET Score will be given preference in merit
